name: Jumbo Gamemon

signature_move.name: Megaton Hydro Laser
signature_move.description: Shoots an extremely high-speed water stream from its mouth cannon, which is capable of penetrating everything.

description: A gigantic Cyborg Digimon that added beam cannons to its entire body until the strength of its Metal Body 's shell was compromised. Its Special Moves are shooting an extremely high-speed water stream from its mouth cannon, which is capable of penetrating everything ( Megaton Hydro Laser ), and strafing with all of its beams cannons simultaneously ( Jumbo Crater ). In addition, because this technique has 360° coverage, a crater is left in the ground after the firing. It is a Special Move that definitely embodies " The best defense is a good offense ." Also, it can retract its legs and fire beams backwards from both of its arms, accelerating itself to perform a spinning charge towards the opponent ( Jumbo Jetter ).
